hero.headline: Plan your perfect trip with AI
hero.subheadline: Describe your dream destination. Get a full personalized itinerary in seconds.
hero.body: Nexploring does not generate generic templates. It builds complete, day-by-day itineraries tailored to your pace, budget, and travel personality — powered by deep contextual AI.
features.title: Everything you need for a great trip
features.label: The advantage
features.body: Nexploring processes terrain, weather, local safety data, and your personal travel profile to build plans that actually work on the ground.
feature.1.title: Learns your travel DNA
feature.1.body: Your pace, budget, energy levels, and preferences shape every plan. Solo adventurer, couple on a getaway, or family vacation — Nexploring adapts to how you actually travel.
feature.2.title: Built for every traveler
feature.2.body: Solo explorers get safety-first intelligence. Couples get romantic hidden gems. Families get kid-friendly logistics. Every plan fits your group.
feature.3.title: Real places, no sponsored lists
feature.3.body: Trained on traveler communities, not tourist boards. Expect places you will not find in a magazine or a generic top-10.
feature.4.title: Living itineraries
feature.4.body: Change a flight, swap a hotel, skip a day — Nexploring recalculates everything downstream. Your plan is always consistent.
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.label: Getting started
howItWorks.step1: Tell us where you want to go
step.1.title: Describe your trip
step.1.body: Destination, travel dates, style. Rough ideas are fine — Nexploring asks follow-up questions to build your profile.
step.2.title: AI builds your itinerary
step.2.body: Complete day-by-day plans with routes, accommodation, activities, and estimated costs — in seconds.
step.3.title: Edit anything, anytime
step.3.body: Change one element and Nexploring reshuffles the rest. Your plan stays coherent even when your plans change.
socialProof.title: Loved by travelers worldwide
socialProof.label: Early access
destinations.label: Explore
precision.label: Under the hood
precision.body: Nexploring reasons through terrain, season, safety, and pacing to build something that works on the ground — not a clipboard of links.
precision.bullet.1.title: Terrain-aware routing
precision.bullet.1.body: Routes factor in elevation, trail conditions, and what is realistic for your timeline and fitness level.
precision.bullet.2.title: Group-adaptive intelligence
precision.bullet.2.body: Solo? Safety scores and single-friendly spots. Couple? Romantic hideaways. Family? Kid logistics, stroller access, nap-time buffers.
precision.bullet.3.title: Live itinerary sync
precision.bullet.3.body: Update one element — a flight, a hotel, an activity — and Nexploring cascades the change through your whole trip.
finalCta.headline: Ready to explore?
finalCta.label: Start exploring
finalCta.body: Describe where you want to go. Nexploring handles the rest.
finalCta.disclaimer: Beta access · No credit card · Cancel anytime
